prompts.name: manual_reference_review
prompts.purpose: Guide manual review of queued references using CSL and sidecar evidence.

prompts.name: citation_integrity_explanation
prompts.purpose: Explain reference report issues without claiming author intent.

prompts.name: provider_conflict_explanation
prompts.purpose: Explain provider/canonical conflicts and the no-silent-overwrite rule.

prompts.name: legal_citation_review
prompts.purpose: Review separate legal citation records, jurisdiction/provider issues, and attorney-review flags without giving legal advice.

prompts.name: claim_source_provenance_review
prompts.purpose: Review claim/source linkage without claim-truth scoring.
